creator: mons@cpan.org
text:
Hm, this seems more reasonable.

I approve it.

On Mon, Mar 28, 2011 at 7:31 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of net/p5-XML-RPC-Fast,
